nasb.text: A sword will come upon Egypt, And anguish will be in Ethiopia; When the slain fall in Egypt, They take away her wealth, And her foundations are torn down.

esv.text: A sword shall come upon Egypt, and anguish shall be in Cush, when the slain fall in Egypt, and her wealth is carried away, and her foundations are torn down.

cnv.text: 必有刀劍臨到埃及， 被殺的人倒在埃及的時候， 在古實就有痛苦； 埃及的財富必被奪去， 它的根基必被拆毀。

ccb.text: 必有刀剑攻击埃及， 埃及必尸横遍野， 古实必痛苦不堪。 敌人要掳掠埃及的财富， 摧毁她的根基。
